# Amazon Bedrock AgentCore - Document History

## Documentation Releases Timeline

### April 9, 2026
- **AWS Agent Registry** - Added documentation for AWS Agent Registry: a centralized catalog for discovering and managing agents, MCP servers, tools, and skills. Provides governed workflows for publishing, reviewing, and approving resources with hybrid semantic and keyword search.

### December 2, 2025
- Policy in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore - Policy-based governance and control for agent interactions
- Episodic memory strategy - AgentCore Memory feature
- Custom claims value support for AgentCore Gateway authentication
- Bidirectional streaming - WebSocket protocol for real-time, full-duplex communication
- Authentication token support for AgentCore Gateway - OAuth authorization setup
- Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Evaluations - Performance, accuracy, and reliability measurement tools
- API gateways as gateway targets - Amazon API Gateway REST API stages as targets

### November 4, 2025
- Direct code deployment - Python agents deployment via ZIP file archives

### October 31, 2025
- Get started updates - Changes to prerequisites, files, and commands

### October 30, 2025
- Web Bot Auth (Preview) - Browser Web Bot Auth feature, cryptographic HTTP request signing

### October 13, 2025
- Runtime identity service-linked role - Manages workload identity access tokens and OAuth credentials
- General release - Amazon Bedrock AgentCore now generally available (GA)

### October 10, 2025
- Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers as Gateway targets

### October 2, 2025
- Model Context Protocol (MCP) server support - Compatible MCP clients: Kiro, Cursor, Claude Code, Amazon Q CLI

### September 19, 2025
- Managed policy updates - BedrockAgentCoreNetworkServiceRolePolicy (new), BedrockAgentCoreFullAccess updated

### July 16, 2025
- Initial release (preview) - First release of Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Developer Guide

## Note
Last fetched: 2026-04-15. No new entries beyond April 9, 2026 (AWS Agent Registry). This entry was already captured in the previous scan on 2026-04-12.
